title: The Wonderful Wizard of Oz
author: Baum, L. Frank (Lyman Frank)
summary: Dorothy, a young girl on the Kansas prairie, is swept away by a cyclone to the marvelous Land of Oz. Her house falls on the Wicked Witch of the East, freeing the Munchkins. Welcomed by the Good Witch of the North, Dorothy begins a journey along the Yellow Brick Road toward the Emerald City to ask the Great Wizard Oz to return her home. She meets companions—a living Scarecrow, a Tin Woodman, and a Cowardly Lion—each seeking a gift from Oz. Together they face dangers, including the Wicked Witch of the West, and ultimately confront the Wizard’s surprising truth revelation.

characters.name: Dorothy Gale
characters.lifespan: survives the adventures and is returned home to Kansas

characters.name: Uncle Henry
characters.lifespan: remains in Kansas with Aunt Em; survives

characters.name: Aunt Em
characters.lifespan: remains in Kansas with Uncle Henry; survives

characters.name: Toto
characters.lifespan: survives and returns home with Dorothy

characters.name: Munchkins
characters.lifespan: freed from bondage after Wicked Witch of the East is killed

characters.name: Witch of the North (Good Witch)
characters.lifespan: lives and aids Dorothy early in her journey

characters.name: Wicked Witch of the East
characters.lifespan: killed when Dorothy's house falls on her

characters.name: Wicked Witch of the West
characters.lifespan: confronted and defeated during Dorothy's quest

characters.name: Oz (the Great Wizard)
characters.personality: enigmatic, authoritative, ultimately revealed as a humbug
characters.lifespan: exposed as an ordinary man masquerading as a wizard; later departs

characters.name: Scarecrow
characters.personality: earnest, good-humored, believes he lacks a brain
characters.lifespan: accompanies Dorothy and is granted a form of wisdom

characters.name: Tin Woodman
characters.personality: gentle, sentimental, believes he lacks a heart
characters.lifespan: joins Dorothy's party and seeks a heart; survives

characters.name: Cowardly Lion
characters.lifespan: becomes courageous and survives; later becomes king of beasts

characters.name: Winged Monkeys
characters.personality: mischievous, powerful air-creatures bound by magic
characters.lifespan: serve under magical constraint; instrumental in events

characters.name: Queen of the Field Mice
characters.lifespan: helps rescue allies; survives the events

characters.name: The Great Humbug
characters.personality: blustering, theatrical, ultimately revealed as fraudulent
characters.lifespan: exposed by Dorothy's party; remains alive but unmasked

characters.name: Guardian of the Gates
characters.lifespan: serves at the Emerald City gates during Dorothy's visit

characters.name: Glinda (Good Witch of the South)
characters.lifespan: grants Dorothy’s wish and aids in returning her home

unusual_words.definition: made a light, ringing sound like small bells
